channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Luka Doncic has triple-double with season-best 45 points in Mavs' 143-133 win over Warriors
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Luka Doncic had his 80th career triple-double with a season-high 45 points along with 13 assists and 11 rebounds, and the Dallas Mavericks beat Klay Thompson's former Golden State Warriors 143-133 on Sunday night in a second visit to Chase Center in just more than a month.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mavericks, Warriors combine for NBA-record 48 3-pointers in Dallas' 143-133 victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The Dallas Mavericks and Golden State Warriors combined for an NBA-record 48 3-pointers Sunday night. Golden State hit 27 and Dallas made 21 in the Mavericks' 143-133 victory at Chase Center.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jalen Hurts accounts for 3 TDs and Eagles beat Steelers 27-13 for franchise-best 10th straight win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts absorbed the shots when the Eagles' recent anemic passing attack was panned by his own star wide receivers. Hurts and A.J.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen has another huge game to lift Bills to a 48-42 victory that snaps Lions' winning streak
item.description: Josh Allen ran for two scores in the first quarter and threw two touchdown passes in the second half, leading the Buffalo Bills to a 48-42 win over the Detroit Lions.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mahomes throws 2 TD passes, leaves with ankle injury in Chiefs' 21-7 win. X-rays negative on star QB
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The only thing the Chiefs had to worry about in the final minutes Sunday was Patrick Mahomes' ankle.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ravens star Lamar Jackson launches 5 touchdowns to destroy Giants
item.description: Lamar Jackson launches five touchdown passes to help the Baltimore Ravens handle the New York Giants convincingly on Sunday in a 35-14 victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Golden State has landed point guard Dennis Schroder in a trade with the Brooklyn Nets in exchange for injured guard De'Anthony Melton and guard Reece Beekman, the teams announced Sunday. The trade was agreed to on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gleaton Jones, former Georgia running back national champion, dead at 21
item.description: Former Georgia Bulldogs running back Gleaton Jones died after he suffered a brain injury in a car wreck last week, his family said. He was 21.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Theismann reveals his stance on Azeez Al-Shaair's controversial hit on Trevor Lawrence
item.description: NFL great Joe Theismann revealed his thoughts about the controversial illegal hit on Trevor Lawrence in an exclusive interview with Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies set school record with 10-0 start
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State has been playing basketball since 1903. Only four times have the Aggies started a season with nine straight wins. On Saturday, this Utah State team became the first to win ten in a row to start a season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump gets warm welcome as he watches Army-Navy game alongside key allies, nominees and Daniel Penny
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump huddled with allies and a Republican cause célèbre at Saturday's Army-Navy football game, taking in one of the most storied rivalries in college sports while spotlighting his emerging national security team.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, TARA COPP and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sixers standout rookie Jared McCain is out indefinitely with a torn meniscus that requires surgery
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers rookie Jared McCain has a meniscus tear in his left knee that requires surgery and is expected to be out indefinitely.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UK hockey team retires Adam Johnson's No. 47 to honor player who died after neck cut
item.description:
Adam Johnson made as big an impression off the ice as he did on it for the Nottingham Panthers.
The U.K. hockey team officially retired Johnson's No. 47 jersey on Saturday in tribute to the American forward who died after his neck was cut by an opponent’s skate during a game over a year ago.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Blackhawks recall top prospect Frank Nazar from the minors
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks recalled top prospect Frank Nazar from the minor leagues on Friday. Chicago also placed defenseman Alec Martinez on injured reserve, retroactive to Dec. 7.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Game-worn Wilt Chamberlain Lakers jersey sells for $333K at auction
item.description: A game-worn Wilt Chamberlain jersey from the 1970-71 Los Angeles Lakers playoff run sold for $333,601 at Grey Flannel Auctions’ holiday auction this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Dick Vitale says he's cancer-free after 4 bouts with disease in just over 3 years
item.description: Vitale had surgery in the summer to remove cancerous lymph nodes from his neck. He was previously treated for melanoma and lymphoma, and had radiation treatments last year for vocal cord cancer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 29 CMU football student-athletes make RMAC All-Academic list
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference unveiled its All-Academic Team for football on Tuesday afternoon. Colorado Mesa University was well-represented, with 29 student-athletes receiving recognition, including five First Team honorees and one major award winner.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: With Dybantsa in the house, BYU blasts Fresno State
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The highest rated recruit in BYU basketball history was at the Marriott Center Wednesday to watch his future team cruise to victory. AJ Dybantsa was witness to a 28-point drubbing by the Cougars over Fresno State, 95-67.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Top-rated recruit AJ Dybantsa chooses BYU
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The definitive #1 rated basketball recruit in the entire country is coming to BYU. AJ Dybantsa, a 6-foot-9 forward, announced on ESPN Tuesday that he is committing to play basketball for the Cougars starting in the 2025-26 season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Green Bay Packers sign Michael Jordan to their practice squad — the offensive lineman
item.description: The Green Bay Packers have signed Michael Jordan to their practice squad. But before Chicago sports fans bemoan the most legendary athlete in city history going to the city's most hated rival, relax: It's not THAT Michael Jordan. For one, he didn't play football. For another, he's 61 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Column: The Bears are broken, and it wasn't the Hail Mary that broke them
item.description: Ryan Poles, the Chicago Bears' General Manager, is responsible for the team's player-execution problem, as the team has been outscored 63-13 in the first quarter this year and has a poor talent pool in key positions.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 coaching staff
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs announced its 2025 coaching staff Monday under the helm of second-year manager Craig Counsell. There are four new additions to his staff, including replacements for third base coach Willie Harris and first base coach Mike Napoli.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9
